ROBERTA: Lucy -- you sounded the worst of all. Have you practiced?
ROBERTA: Why not? You can't be in this class if you don't practice!
LUCY: My grandma got mugged.
ROBERTA: Oh. I'm sorry. Is she O.K.?

evidence_snippets: NAEEM is described as a graceful Black boy with a scar on his left cheek.
GUADALUPE is described as a petite Mexican girl with a long dark braid.
Roberta is described as a single mother and violin teacher in a predominantly Black and Puerto Rican school.
Shandra Wilson is a pretty Black girl with braids and tons of barrettes.
Myesha is a chubby Black girl.
